falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong upward trend would contradict the HOLD signal and invalidate the UNKNOWN verdict by indicating a clear bullish reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 70 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff top would directly contradict the current HOLD signal, proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect by showing a sharp reversal in momentum.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price drops below the support level of the 2024_aug bottom by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below the key support level would invalidate the pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, proving the UNKNOWN verdict wrong by showing a deeper decline than anticipated.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
